head: 6c761ba 2026-07-14 20:47:20 +0200
branches_note: Audited origin/main @6c761ba, which just merged origin/dev via PR #41 (origin/dev is level, ahead=0). Two unmerged branches sit 1 commit ahead of main: origin/fix/inline-canedit-404-clean-deny (b0c6b77 - treat can-edit/can-view 404 as a clean deny, ENG-2052/D13) and origin/crew/daniel (663b11a - scale studio-ai-metering to 0 until the Kafka client is wired). Neither changes any story's merged status materially. The user's local checkout is on fix/ai-canedit-envelope-unwrap (dc8930e), NOT audited. ENG-2069 hazard: minor fixes live on ahead branches but the substantive corpus is on main.

E1-S1.note: SSE data-stream chat turn is real end-to-end.

E1-S2.note: Branch/fork + message lifecycle present; session list + full-text search absent.

E1-S3.note: TTL expiry + reconciler present; async auto-titling + cost-backfill absent.

E1-S4.note: Memory recall wired into chat; DfM page-context + RAG-citation assembly not wired on the chat path.

E1-S5.note: Incremental turn ledger + reconciler heal path present with integration test.

E2-S1.note: Bounded in-request loop present; data-driven tool registry + tool execution + output validation NOT built.

E2-S2.note: Block-chokepoint client present + used by diagram bake; page-edit as an LLM-callable tool not wired (blocked on E2-S1).

E2-S3.note: 402 QUOTA_EXCEEDED surfaced verbatim as a typed error frame.

E2-S4.note: SearXNG web-search helper present + SSRF-guarded; tools-retry surface not wired (tool leg unbuilt).

E2-S5.note: Server-side mermaid->drawio/excalidraw bake is real and routed.

E3-S1.note: Cited-ask core is real (retrieval + threshold + envelope); heavy multi-hop tool-loop is single-pass.

E3-S2.note: K5 synthesis + grounding rules + citation/deep-link composition present.

E3-S3.note: GET /api/ai/ask front door is real; MCP-direct lives in sibling orvex-studio-mcp.

E3-S4.note: Inline AI selection/cursor completions + transforms present and routed.

E3-S5.note: Server-backed AI draft slot per {workspace,user,page} with lifecycle + TTL sweep present.

E4-S1.note: Per-tenant virtual key mint + max_budget backstop provisioning present.

E4-S2.note: Per-caller scoped LiteLLM keys + cost-center tagging present.

E4-S3.note: Entitlement read + budget reconcile present; billing.entitlement.changed consumer + event-driven cache eviction NOT wired (TODO).

E4-S4.note: Pre-flight spend check is real and fail-closed (never zero-on-failure).

evidence: (no model-class allowlist / frontier-gate code in internal/)
E4-S5.note: Free-tier model-class allowlist gate not implemented.

E4-S6.note: Usage journal + Kafka metering worker + Postgres + Redis counters present; cap-alert emission is TODO.

E4-S7.note: Usage-reporting API is a 501 stub; nested embedding budget is scaffold; capped/uncapped CI gate not evidenced.

E5-S1.note: LiteLLM sole-gateway + transport + tool-model swap present; GET /api/ai/models endpoint absent.

E5-S2.note: tenant_ai_config store + encrypted key present; settings API (HTTP) absent.

E5-S3.note: Read-only base-URL/virtual-key invariant documented; no settings-write path exists so no typed rejection is wired.

evidence: internal/inline/inline.go:79-88 AC11 PII-redaction seam NOT yet wired (honesty flag)
E5-S4.note: PII redactor present as a function; fail-closed outbound middleware not wired into the request path.

E5-S5.note: Image generation REST + emit-image tool shell + paid-gate present; MCP generate_image wiring lives in sibling repo.

E6-S1.note: model-call durable step is a 501 stub.

E6-S2.note: tool-exec durable step is a 501 stub.

E6-S3.note: result-sink durable step is a 501 stub.

E6-S4.note: Session/delegation-token exchange primitive present; not wired at a tool-exec step (that step is absent).

E6-S5.note: Maintenance schedules + outbox relay present; durable step boundary + A-RELAY progress-over-durable + worker guard absent.

E7-S1.note: Prompt library CRUD + system-prompt rendering present.

E7-S2.note: Memories CRUD + chat-recall + opt-in setting + space-scoped visibility present.

evidence: (no extraction pipeline in internal/ or cmd/)
(no beads/staging capture edge in internal/ or cmd/)

E7-S5.note: Proposal dedup/reconcile + memory-poisoning defense not implemented.

E7-S6.note: Continuous proposal-quality eval + regression gate not implemented.

evidence: internal/memory/service.go:79 RenderSection per-memory + total payload caps
E7-S7.note: Token-budgeted memory injection cap present; >=50% measure/surface + warm-cache + inbound import absent.

evidence: postgres.go:19 tenant-GUC/RLS is a COMMENT only
E8-S1.note: Postgres schema + repository seam present; tenant-RLS policies + per-request GUC NOT implemented.

evidence: migrations/0003_usage_outbox_tables.sql (ai_usage_journal PARTITION BY RANGE, default partition only)
E8-S2.note: Range-partitioned journal + Redis caches present; step-ledger append tables + partition cronjob absent.

E8-S3.note: Edge token verification + upstream pass-through present; explicit RequireFresh knob not separately named.

E8-S4.note: Transactional outbox + Kafka relay + ce-id idempotency + orvexcell fail-closed present.

E8-S5.note: Liveness/readiness split + cell-contract echo + metrics present; full OTel->LGTM SLI export partial.

E8-S6.note: No-AGPL-import CI guard + latency-budget verification present.

evidence: (no improve-with-AI backend; only referenced as a billing GatedFeature name in clients.go:692)
(no Prompt Composer backend; 'composer' only a billing GatedFeature name in clients.go:691)

E9-S3.note: Wizard prompt-builder AI-assist backend not implemented.

E9-S4.note: Orvex rating AI scoring factor not implemented.

summary: orvex-studio-ai is a substantial, honestly-scaffolded Go service: 20 stories present, 17 partial, 12 absent. The interactive front doors are real and tested (chat SSE, cited-ask GET /api/ai/ask, inline, diagram bake, image gen) as is the metering/budget spine (pre-flight fail-closed gate, per-caller scoped keys, Kafka usage journal, transactional outbox+relay, edge auth, health). The service is deliberate about honesty: unbuilt pieces are 501 todo() stubs, not fakes. The main gaps are the durable Temporal step-APIs (E6, all 501 stubs), the memory-extraction/proposal slice (E7-S3..S6 absent), the AI product-feature backends (E9 all absent), and several supporting cross-cuts (tool-execution leg, tenant-RLS, settings API + /api/ai/models, model-class allowlist gate, usage-reporting API).
